prose:
The frontier molecular orbitals of benzene were calculated using Density Functional Theory (DFT) at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level of theory (tier `standard`) with density fitting, as run in the PySCF program. The calculation was performed in the gas phase on the user-provided geometry as a single-point calculation, assuming a neutral charge (0) and a spin multiplicity of 1. The SCF calculation converged in 8 cycles and no warnings were reported.

The resulting frontier orbital energies are:
HOMO: -7.0468329 eV
LUMO: -0.41574728 eV
HOMO-LUMO gap: 6.6310857 eV
